fixedFindings: Pending attention count is now owner/store/localStore scoped via fetchCount.
Coalesced summary refresh requests are replayed after in-flight refresh completion.
Provider remote fetcher test fake made deterministic.
Debounced drift cached-snapshot test now waits for refreshed local drift state.
acceptedNotes: Presenter remains MainActor but heavy array materialization paths are removed.
Legacy nil-store pending rows are not counted in the Options hot path; new rows are store-normalized.
